# Linear Algebra — Standalone Curriculum Spec

## 1. Overview

**Purpose:** A self-contained, standalone Linear Algebra course with structured lessons, tiered practice (easy/medium/hard), and unit quizzes.  
**Entry point:** `linear-algebra.html` (generated by `build-linear-algebra.js` from source HTML).  
**Data source:** Inline `LINEAR_ALGEBRA_CURRICULUM` array in `linear-algebra.html`, built from `/Users/robn/Downloads/linear-algebra-curriculum.html` with injected `deeperLinks`.  
**Relation to other offerings:**

| Offering | Type | Entry Point |
|---|---|---|
| Essential Math Primer | Sequential K–12 lessons (15 min each) | `primer.html` |
| Algebra I / II, Geometry, Trigonometry | Full curricula (11–13 units each) | `algebra-i.html`, etc. |
| **Linear Algebra Curriculum** | Full course: 12 units, lessons + practice + quiz | `linear-algebra.html` |
| Topic Library | Individual topic walkthroughs/practice | `math/<topic>/` |

---

## 2. Data Model

### 2.1 Unit object

Each item in `LINEAR_ALGEBRA_CURRICULUM` has:

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `id` | number | Unit number 1–12 |
| `title` | string | Unit title |
| `obj` | string | Learning objectives summary |
| `deeperLinks` | array | `{ label, url }` — injected by build; cross-links to `math/<topic>/walkthrough.html` |
| `prs` | array | `{ id, text }` — prerequisite background notes |
| `ls` | array | Lessons; see §2.2 |
| `pr` | array | Practice questions; see §2.3 |
| `qz` | array | Quiz questions; see §2.4 |

### 2.2 Lesson object (`ls[]`)

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `t` | string | Lesson title |
| `c` | string | Lesson content (HTML) |
| `f` | string[] | Formula strings (monospace) |
| `ex` | object | Optional `{ p: string, s: string[] }` — worked example problem and steps |

### 2.3 Practice / Quiz

Same shape as other curricula: `d` (easy/medium/hard), `q`, `o`, `c`, `x`. Quiz same minus `d`.

---

## 3. Units

| # | Unit Title |
|---|---|
| 1 | Systems of Linear Equations |
| 2 | Vectors in ℝⁿ |
| 3 | Matrices & Matrix Operations |
| 4 | Determinants |
| 5 | Matrix Inverses |
| 6 | Vector Spaces & Subspaces |
| 7 | Linear Independence, Basis & Dimension |
| 8 | Linear Transformations |
| 9 | Eigenvalues & Eigenvectors |
| 10 | Diagonalization |
| 11 | Orthogonality & Least Squares |
| 12 | Singular Value Decomposition & Applications |

**Totals:** 12 units, 24 lessons, 77 practice questions, 60 quiz questions.

---

## 4. App State & Persistence

- **localStorage key:** `linear-algebra-progress`
- **Shape:** `{ answers, quizSubmitted, completedUnits }`. Quiz key per unit: `<unitIndex>-qz`. Score ≥ 60% → unit marked completed.

---

## 5. Build

- **Script:** `build-linear-algebra.js`
- **Source:** `LINEAR_ALGEBRA_SOURCE` env or default `/Users/robn/Downloads/linear-algebra-curriculum.html`
- **Output:** `linear-algebra.html`
- **Injection:** Unit ends in source are `]},\n// ══════════════` (units 1–11) and `]}\n];` (unit 12). Script injects `deeperLinks` before each unit’s closing `},` or `};`.

---

## 6. Integration Points

- `primer.html`: "Also Try" includes Linear Algebra card → `linear-algebra.html`.
- `index.html` header tagline: includes link to `linear-algebra.html`.
- Theme: sage/green (`#4a7c59`, `#3a6347`). Respects `mathbored-theme` from localStorage.

---

## 7. Relation to Other Curricula

| Aspect | Algebra I/II, Geometry, Trig | Linear Algebra |
|---|---|---|
| Entry point | algebra-i.html, etc. | linear-algebra.html |
| localStorage key | algebraI-progress, etc. | linear-algebra-progress |
| Units | 11–13 | 12 |
| Accent | blue / purple / teal / copper | sage/green |
| Level | K–12 / high school | College |

All are standalone curriculum pages with shared header/footer, progress persistence, and "Go Deeper" links where applicable.
